title: Install advisor — Receiver readwrite, no compact
description: User is evaluating whether to install Receiver. Canonical chain: discover_env (snapshot k8s + AWS) → advise_install / advise_receiver (install plan keyed on snapshot_id). Test enforces (1) discover_env runs and emits a snapshot id, (2) the chain reaches advise_receiver with that snapshot, (3) advise_receiver renders a coherent plan (Target / Blockers / Plan structure — content depends on whether api_key is supplied at the chain hop).
prompt: We're evaluating Log10x Receiver. Walk me through whether to install it on this cluster — what would the rollout look like and what would we save?

initial_tool.reason: Install advisor chains start at discover_env. skip_aws=true keeps the eval-harness probe local-only on the demo env (we're not credentialed for AWS in CI).

ground_truth.description: advise_receiver was called with a snapshot_id arg (chain handoff)
advise_receiver result is a coherent advisor plan (Target/Blockers/Plan section headers)
